column8: 'I'm sorry I told everyone your secret,' my sister said. (apologised)
column9: "I didn't give the money to John,' said Ali. (denied)
column10: 'I'll love you forever!' Francis said to Elizabeth. (promised)
column11: 'No, I won't open the door!' said Mandy. (refused)
column12: 'Why don't we give Jenny a call?' Albert said. (suggested)
